ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., memory, decision-making) */,
  "condition_range" TEXT /* Range of conditions for the task */,
  "stimuli_type" TEXT /* Type of stimuli used in the task */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Format of participant responses */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score possible for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant performing the trial */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being performed */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition under which the trial is conducted */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the session */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of stimuli presented */,
  "response" TEXT /* Participant's response */,
  "n_correct" INTEGER /* Number of correct responses */,
  "partial_score" INTEGER /* Partial score for the trial */,
  "trigger_correct" TEXT /* Binary string indicating the correctness of each response */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_time" TEXT /* Time the trial was conducted */,
  "latency" REAL /* Average latency of participant responses */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of participant responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant who participated in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_conditions" (
  "task_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task-condition mapping */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "task_condition_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the task-condition mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_conditions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "total_trials" INTEGER /* Total number of trials completed */,
  "total_correct" INTEGER /* Total number of correct responses */,
  "average_partial_score" REAL /* Average partial score across all trials */,
  "average_trigger_correct" TEXT /* Average trigger correctness across all trials */,
  "average_latency" REAL /* Average latency across all trials */,
  "average_accuracy" REAL /* Average accuracy across all trials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant whose data is accessed */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "changed_fields" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of fields that were changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant scheduled */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the scheduled session */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task to be performed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition for the task */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the scheduled session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_schedule_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_schedule_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_schedule_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task template */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task template */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task template */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., memory, decision-making) */,
  "stimuli_type" TEXT /* Type of stimuli used in the task */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Format of participant responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data exported (e.g., trials, performance metrics) */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, system update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
